companies.name: Infosys
companies.reason: Infosys is gaining attention due to its expected revenue growth in FY25, forecasted between 1-3%. This has sparked interest from multiple mutual funds, which increased their positions in the company significantly during April 2024.

companies.name: HCL Technologies
companies.reason: The stock rallied by 4.03% in Q4 FY24 and has seen substantial appreciation of 41% over the past year. This performance aligns with stronger earnings expectations as the IT sector gears up for its earnings season.

companies.name: Tech Mahindra
companies.reason: Tech Mahindra is highlighted as one of the biggest gainers in recent trading sessions, benefiting from the overall market bullishness and strong demand in the technology sector. The company is also recognized for its innovative services and expanding market presence.
